description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named StyleCheck that runs on push to all branches except dependabot/*, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two ubuntu-latest jobs: spacing and encoding. The spacing job checks out the repository, installs moreutils, fixes mixed tabs and spaces, trailing white spaces, and ensures files end with a new line, then reports the result. The encoding job checks out the repository, installs dos2unix and recode, fixes file encoding to UTF-8, ensures LF line endings and no BOM, then reports the result.
